/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,pipellm_acl.so -o lib/pipellm_acl.so CMakeFiles/pipellm_acl.dir/pipellm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipellm_acl.dir/openssl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipellm_acl.dir/worker.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/tools/simulator/Ascend910B3/lib  lib/libascendc_kernels_npu.so /home/lzy/miniconda3/envs/npu_env/lib/libssl.so /home/lzy/miniconda3/envs/npu_env/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64/libascendcl.so /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64/libnnopbase.so /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64/libopapi.so -lpthread -ldl -lascendcl -lruntime -lregister -lerror_manager -lprofapi -lge_common_base -lascendalog -lmmpa -lascend_dump -lc_sec -ldl
